arts.ttl: Newcastle United's January transfer wildcard impresses Eddie Howe with blistering message
arts.sum: Steve Harper and Paul Midgley [head of youth recruitment] showed me the pathway of players such as Alex Murphy, who came through Galway's academy and then signed for Newcastle like myself." The 18-year-old arrived in January from Galway United with the club's Academy excited to beat Wolverhampton Wanderers to his signature.

arts.ttl: Howe praises the 'heart and desire' of Newcastle's players
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes struck the only goal of the game at the London Stadium as Howe's side picked up three points to stay firmly in the race for a UEFA Champions League spot. Howe was also delighted at his team's focus with Newcastle due to face Liverpool in the EFL Cup final at Wembley on Sunday.

arts.ttl: West Ham duo explain why Newcastle winner should have been disallowed
arts.sum: Graham Potter and Max Kilman both feel officials wrong not to rule out Bruno Guimaraes’ decisive second-half volley

arts.ttl: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe hails ‘massive win’ at West Ham ahead of cup final
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes stuck out a leg to turn home Harvey Barnes’ cross in the 63rd minute for the game’s only goal.

arts.ttl: Serie A ace linked with a surprise move to West Ham as Potter eyes big defensive upgrade
arts.sum: West Ham United are preparing for a significant squad overhaul this summer as manager Graham Potter looks to rebuild following a challenging Premier League campaign. Currently sitting 15th in the table, the Hammers have struggled this season, particularly under former manager Julen Lopetegui, who was sacked mid-season. The former Brighton boss took over and while […] The post Serie A ace linked with a surprise move to West Ham as Potter eyes big defensive upgrade appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United deliver injury updates after Sandro Tonali scare at West Ham
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has declared that Newcastle United have a "clean bill of health" after the 1-0 win over West Ham ahead of Wembley on Sunday. Need to win when the game is tight and find a way to get over the line.

arts.ttl: “Clear weaknesses” | Newcastle defeat leaves Hammers Boss Potter with a lot to think about
arts.sum: West Ham’s lasting issues remain apparent in defeat at home to Newcastle. This season is essentially over for West Ham. No threat of relegation and no hope of European football means that the rest of the campaign is for Graham Potter to assess, experiment, and improve. arts.ttl: West Ham: Newcastle defeat a missed opportunity as Graham Potter expectations tempered
arts.sum: Tomas Soucek’s early miss proves costly as Hammers see winning run ended in frustrating fashion

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes gives Newcastle perfect Carabao Cup final preparation with West Ham win
arts.sum: WEST HAM 0-1 NEWCASTLE: Bruno Guimaraes was on target for the Magpies in the second half as attention now turns to the Carabao Cup final against Liverpool on Sunday

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes leaves West Ham screaming as Newcastle United fans unleash hilarious Tindall chant
arts.sum: The Hammers had a clear-cut chance in the first minute of the game as Mo Kudus got down the left and crossed to the back post but Tomas Soucek - a scorer in the reverse fixture which ended 2-0 to West Ham - blazed over from close range without even testing Nick Pope. Bruno Guimaraes slipped in Harvey Barnes down the left on 18 minutes, but his effort was high and wide, leaving West Ham stopper Alphonse Areola untroubled.
